subject: feat(builder): mobile-friendly builder with bottom sheets and move buttons
body:
Replace the "Desktop required" mobile blocker with a fully responsive
builder layout. On mobile (<768px): canvas is full-width, field palette
opens as a bottom sheet via FAB button, properties panel opens as a
bottom sheet when a field is tapped. Drag-to-reorder replaced with
up/down move buttons to avoid scroll conflicts on touch devices.
Action buttons (duplicate/remove) always visible on mobile instead of
hover-only. Header collapses secondary actions into overflow menu.

Tags: mobile, responsive, ui, builder
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-friendly-builder
Semver: minor

title: mobile-friendly builder with bottom sheets and move buttons
